# Fractals

> Fractals is an open-source cross-platform IPTV player (desktop + web) that supports M3U/M3U8 playlists, Xtream Codes API, Stalker portals, and XMLTV EPG.

## Canonical URLs

- Website: https://fractaltv.github.io/fractals/
- Blog: https://fractaltv.github.io/fractals/blog/
- Latest Release: https://github.com/FractalTV/fractals/releases/latest
- Source Code: https://github.com/FractalTV/fractals

## Product Scope

- Fractals is a media player application.
- It does not provide, host, or sell playlists, channels, or media content.
- Any channel names or metadata shown in screenshots/posts are demo examples only.

## Machine-readable Discovery

- Sitemap: https://fractaltv.github.io/fractals/sitemap-index.xml
- Robots: https://fractaltv.github.io/fractals/robots.txt
